applicationNote: Apply through the myNSFAS portal at www.nsfas.org.za before the national closing date.

additionalFunding.name: UCT Academic Excellence Scholarship
additionalFunding.criteria: Matric aggregate 90%+ or APS 44+; South African citizens

additionalFunding.name: UCT Vice-Chancellor's Scholarship
additionalFunding.criteria: Exceptional academic and leadership record; top 0.1% matric cohort

additionalFunding.name: UCT Sports Excellence Award
additionalFunding.criteria: National or provincial colours; must maintain academic standing

additionalFunding.name: UCT Equity Scholarship
additionalFunding.criteria: Historically disadvantaged South African students with financial need
